name: Casper Sleep Inc.
description: Casper Sleep Inc. is an e-commerce company that sells sleep products online and through retail locations. Founded in 2014, the company is headquartered in New York City and is known for its innovative 'bed-in-a-box' mattresses. Casper's product line includes mattresses, pillows, sheets, duvets, bedroom furniture, and sleep accessories, all designed to improve sleep quality through advanced engineering and design.
